name: orders_2023.csv
dataset_description: This file appears to contain a list of orders, including order IDs, customer IDs, amounts, currencies, and dates.

column_overview.name: customer_id
column_overview.inferred_role: identifier for the customer who made the order

column_overview.name: amount
column_overview.inferred_role: total amount of the order in the specified currency

column_overview.name: currency
column_overview.inferred_role: the currency used for the transaction (all USD in this sample)
column_overview.notes: All example values are 'USD', which may indicate a single-currency dataset or a need to consider exchange rates if international transactions are expected.

column_overview.name: order_date
column_overview.inferred_role: date when the order was made

summary: The sample contains 20 rows with consistent date format (YYYY-MM-DD) and a single currency (USD).
key_problems: All example values for 'currency' are 'USD', which may indicate a single-currency dataset or a need to consider exchange rates if international transactions are expected.
recommendations: Consider adding a column to track the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) to enhance data analysis capabilities.
confidence_notes: The sample size is relatively small (20 rows), which may not be representative of the entire dataset. Further analysis with a larger sample or more data would be beneficial for making conclusions about the dataset's quality and characteristics.
